name: Eicher Motors Ltd / Royal Enfield
basis: Standalone — Eicher Motors (Royal Enfield is the motorcycle segment under the standalone entity)

sources.notes: Awaiting upload of audited annual-report workbook. Match the schema and tab layout of TVS_Motor_Financials_Actuals_FY16_FY25.xlsx: tabs = Financials / Metrics / Source Notes; standalone basis (Eicher Motors); FY16 → FY25 columns; line items = Revenue, Other Income, Cost of Materials, Employee Benefits, EBITDA, D&A, EBIT, Interest, PBT, PAT, Total Assets, Net Worth, Total Debt, Cash & Investments, Net Debt, Receivables, Inventory, Payables, Working Capital, CFO, Capex, FCF, CFI, CFF, Total Sales Volume, segment breakouts where disclosed (350cc / 450cc / 650cc / Exports). Note: Royal Enfield doesn't sell scooters / mopeds / 3W — those rows stay null.
